prompt: A realistic 16:9 close-up photograph of a sheet of slightly textured white paper resting diagonally on a medium-brown wooden table, viewed from a shallow overhead angle. On the paper, a short French poem is handwritten neatly in elegant cursive with vivid {argument name="ink color" default="blue"} ink. The title at the top center reads {argument name="poem title" default="Pigeon"}. Beneath it are exactly 4 lines of handwriting, centered and evenly spaced: {argument name="poem line 1" default="Oiseau à la grise robe,"}, {argument name="poem line 2" default="Dans l'enfer des villes"}, "À mon regard tu te dérobes", and "Tu es vraiment le plus agile." Keep the handwriting graceful, legible, and natural, like careful fountain-pen calligraphy by hand rather than typography. Soft warm indoor lighting, subtle shadows along the paper edges, visible paper grain, and a simple uncluttered composition focused entirely on the handwritten poem.
translatedPrompt: 一张 16:9 的逼真特写照片，展示了一张略带纹理的白纸斜放在中棕色的木桌上，以浅俯角拍摄。纸上用优雅的草书整齐地手写着一首简短的法语诗，使用的是鲜艳的 {argument name="ink color" default="蓝色"} 墨水。顶部的标题居中写着 {argument name="poem title" default="鸽子"}。下方是 4 行手写文字，居中且间距均匀：{argument name="poem line 1" default="Oiseau à la grise robe,"}，{argument name="poem line 2" default="Dans l'enfer des villes"}，“À mon regard tu te dérobes” 以及 “Tu es vraiment le plus agile。” 手写字体需保持优雅、清晰且自然，呈现出如同钢笔手写般的质感，而非印刷字体。柔和的室内暖光，纸张边缘带有细微阴影，纸张纹理清晰可见，构图简洁明快，完全聚焦于手写的诗歌。

breakdown.creativeCore: 纸上的手写法语诗歌：此提示词可生成一张逼真的特写照片，展示了白纸上用蓝色墨水书写的法语诗歌，适用于文学或怀旧文具风格的图像。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；要求可读；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 品牌字标、标题字、活动视觉、字体风格探索

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 字体/Logo image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, close-up]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；要求可读；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
